description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN. Define a single stage called build. Add a build-master job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest". Add a build-other job in the build stage that runs on all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". No caches, artifacts, or further deployment steps.
